title: Apply to change the representative member of a VAT group
body: "Use this form if you want to change the lead company or other corporate body (known as the ‘representative member’) of a VAT group.  Before you start  If the proposed new representative member is not already a member of the VAT group, you must complete the VAT50/51 form.  What you will need  To change the representative member of a VAT group, you’ll need:   VAT Registration Number of the current representative member of the VAT group full names of both the current, and proposed, representative members full details of any special status for VAT purposes the proposed representative member holds   Apply to make changes  Apply online  You’ll need to sign in to apply online. If you do not already have sign in details, you’ll be able to create them.  If you’re an agent, you’ll need to sign in or create an agent services account.  Apply now   If you cannot use the online service    Get all of your information together before you start. You will fill this form in online and you cannot save your progress.   Fill in  VAT56  (PDF, 222 KB, 1 page)   Print and post it to HMRC, using the postal address shown on the form.    Related forms and guidance  Get more information on how to make changes to an existing VAT group.  Use form VAT50/51 to amend or remove an existing VAT group or apply to register a VAT group. "
